route.name: Fire & Ice Cave Loop
route.region: Gifford Pinchot National Forest / Trout Lake / Goose Lake
route.description: Official/public GPX two-day Gifford Pinchot loop on forest roads and dirt connectors around Indian Heaven Wilderness.
route.surfaceMix: Official/public GPX two-day Gifford Pinchot loop on forest roads and dirt connectors around Indian Heaven Wilderness.
route.bestSeason: Summer to early fall; July 10-13 needs Gifford Pinchot alerts, fire-order, smoke, and road refresh.

difficultyProfile.surface: Official/public GPX two-day Gifford Pinchot loop on forest roads and dirt connectors around Indian Heaven Wilderness.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: No potable water at Goose Lake; filter/carry from lakes, Cold Spring, Surprise Lake, Falls Creek, and Peterson Prairie when operating.
resources.food: No food resupply on route; carry all food.
resources.camping: Goose Lake and Forlorn Lakes first-come campgrounds plus official dispersed-camping backup outside restricted areas.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Do not assume campfires are allowed.
Carry a conservative water filter and extra capacity.
Re-check Gifford Pinchot alerts and road conditions before travel.
hazards: no potable water at Goose Lake

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

blockers: Not ride-ready until date-specific camp/permit, water, legal access, closures, fire/smoke, and weather are refreshed.
requiredFixes: Complete July 9-10 final refresh for next-weekend ride readiness.
openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?

promotionChecklist.targetWindowNote: Strong July fallback: short Gifford Pinchot loop with direct GPX, FCFS/dispersed overnight path, known water plan, and active no-campfire restrictions encoded.
promotionChecklist.officialGeometryNote: Official/public GPX has been imported and parsed locally.

days.name: Fire & Ice Cave Loop segment 1
days.camp: Goose Lake and Forlorn Lakes first-come campgrounds plus official dispersed-camping backup outside restricted areas.

logistics: Final ride-ready status requires live date-specific resource and legal checks.
